titleStmt.title: SII 24.476: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 476. (A.R. No. 376 of 1953-54.) IV PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL, PROPER RIGHT OF THE ĀRYABHAṬṬĀḶ-VĀŚAL.

summary.p: Records that Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ōbalarāja, son of Rāmarāja Kōnēṭi-Ayyaṉ of the lunar race and of the Ātrēya-gōtra, Āpastamba-sūtra and Yajuśśākhā having constructed the Tiruppāṇāḻvār-maṇḍapam which had fallen into ruins, endowed lands at Rāmapuram and Akhilāṇḍapuram alias Ēkavīramaṅgalam assessed to yield 30 poṉ per annum for offerings and worship of the god when the deity halted in the maṇḍapa on the occasion of the Viruppaṇṇa-Uḍaiyar-tirunāḷ, the 5th day festivities in the month of Chittirai. The details of the date viz. Śaka 1475, Ānanda, Siṁha, śu. Uttiṛāḍam may perhaps be equated with 1554 A.D., August 10, Friday on which day the nakshatra Uttirāḍam ended at ·88 of the day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaleśvara rājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvirasadāśivarāya mahārāyar prathivirājyam paṇṇi Aruḷā niṉṟa śakābdam 1000 4 100 7 10 6 Itaṉmel cellā
niṉṟa Āṉanta samvatsarattu simhanāyaṟṟu pūrva pakṣattu [ daśiyum] mum peṟṟa Uttirāṭa nakṣatrattu nāḷ teṉkarai pāṇṭi kulācanivaḷanāṭṭu viḻāvaṟāvitivaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaraṅkat tiruppati perumāḷ
śrīraṅganāthadevar śrīpaṇṭārattukku somakula tilakarāna Ātraiyagotrattu [ Āpastampa] sūtrattu yejuśśākhāddhyāyiyāna śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvara Irāmarāja koneṭi Ayyaṉa putran Opaḷarājāveṉ teṇṭaṉ sama
rppittu poliyūṭṭuc cilāśāsanam paṇṇikkoṭuttapaṭi Eṉṉuṭaiya Ubhaiya māka Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu Alaivantapuram � ṉuyil Ellaikkuḷ tiruppāṇāḻvār tirumāḷikaip puṟamāṉa maṇṭapam Iṭiñcu Āḻvā
yi Anta maṇṭapam Aḻivittuttantu Anta maṇṭapattil viruppaṇauṭaiyā rtiruṉāḷ cittirait tirunāḷ Añcāntiruṉāḷil Eṟi Aruḷi Amutu ceytaruḷum kaṭṭaḷaikku tiruviḷaiyāṭṭamāka koṇṭu cetta
Iccampāṭi Akarattu kāśyapagotrattu Āpastambasutrattu ppar kaiyil śrīpaṇṭārattile koṇṭuṭaiyatāna coḻa maṇṭalam kāveri Āṟṟukkut teṟku tiruvitip peruvaḻikku meṟku
tiruvārur Ucāvaṭi Uyyakkoṇṭa coḻavaḷanāṭṭu ti maccūr mā kaṇaiyil kuṭiyāṉa kraṣṇadevamahārāyapurattukku Ellai Āvaṉa kaṟkaṟṟai Ellaikku kiḻakku nāṭṭār vāykkālukku teṟku pe mā
kuṭi Ellaikku meṟku Āṟṟukku vaṭakku Iṉṉāṉkellaikkuḷ paṭṭa grāmam 1 kku nañcey puñcey nattam paṭukai tikṣitar putraril yejñeśvaran Uḷpaṭṭār kaiyil veṅkappar koṇṭu
śrīpaṇṭārattile mutal ccuk koṇṭu veṅkappar kaiyil koṇṭa śāsa ṭaiya poliyūṭṭukkaṭṭaḷaikku nāṉ mutaliṭṭa poṉ 2 100-kku
Inta grāmattil Irekaippaṭiyil varum viḻukkāṭu Ituvum kāśyapagotrattu bodhāyanasūtrattu paṅgaja[bhṛṅgarāna] tiru varaicciyyar kaiyil nāṉ koṇṭu samarppittu muṉṉāḷ tirupper
mahājanaṅgaḷ kaiyil Avar koṇṭuṭaiyatāna tiruccilāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭi teṉkarai Irācakempiravaḷanāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattu melpilāṟṟu Ēkaviramaṅkalam Āṉa Aki lāṇṭapuram
m5(1/4)kku(1/2)4u 10(1/2)kku Irekaippaṭi Āka vakai 2 kku pon_ 3 10 kku maṇṭapattu Uḷḷa tirukkuttu maṇiviḷakkukku [ney ] tiruvantikkāppukku ney Uri Āka ney
Amutu ceytaruḷukiṟa poriamutu � Atirasam 3 100 kku pon_ 6 U 5 vaṭai 3 100-kku poṉ poṉ 1 U 5 veccamutu kūṉ kku poṉ kūṉ
� 5 cempātaḷikai 6 10 kku pon_ 6 cemattaḷikai 4-kku poṉ 1u 6 kku veṟṟilai vilai U 5 cantāṉam Erikarumpukku 100 kku pon_ 2 kkāṟanukku
ttukku ney vilai poṉ 1 panta lai U 5 koṭi kuṭai Uḷpaṭa vakai vilai ruppaṉāma
viṇṇappam ceyvār Irekaippaṭi viḻukkāṭu mahāja
(1/2) kku Ākap poṉ muppatum koṇṭu Intat tirut tiruṉāḷ kaṭṭaḷai candrādityavaraiyum naṭattak kaṭavatākavum Intappaṭikku viṭṭavaṉ viḻukkāṭu pattil Oṉṟum EkāṅkiA few lines after this have not come out well on the impression.
Digital edition of SII 24.476 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
